title: codereview: current_channel not included in signed_data() for CCP-9 announce
description: P2 finding from project-LICHEN-dtj5. The Python AnnounceMessage.signed_data() omits current_channel despite CCP-9 rendezvous using it for peer rx_channel pinning and select_rendezvous_channel. Tampering possible if not signed. Per spec 9.2 security model and da2q. Decision: MUST include to bind announced channel to authenticated signer. Rust/C equivalents also miss it. Tagged codereview.
close_reason: All child codereview beads fixed; triple impl bit-exact on signed_data including current_channel after seq_num at offset 42; Python test with precomputed independent oracle; C/Rust/Python parse/to_bytes/write_signed_data synced; tests pass; quality gates passed. Human bead 3i18.4 filed for spec update.
